stemHtml: Per ICAO Doc 8168 (PANS-OPS), what avionics are needed to perform a parallel instrument approach?

options.a: Standard IFR avionics including full ILS or MLS capability.
options.b: A navigation system meeting RNP APCH requirements.
options.c: A navigation system meeting RNP-RNAV requirements.
options.d: IFR avionics with LCD displays on both the commander's and co-pilot's sides.
